summary: Tested Advanced Job Matching feature with filters and scoring. Fixed critical frontend bug (JobCard not defined). All 18 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: filter panel with all required fields, priority selectors, search button, RQTH restrictions.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility issue (pre-existing)

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: JobCard component was missing in ParticulierView.jsx - added component definition
GET /api/jobs/matching/preferences - returns has_preferences=false for new user (VERIFIED)
PUT /api/jobs/matching/preferences - saves filter criteria with priorities (VERIFIED)
GET /api/jobs/matching/preferences - returns saved prefs after PUT (VERIFIED)
GET /api/jobs/matching - backward compatible, loads saved prefs (VERIFIED)
calculate_job_score function - correct scoring with blocages, vigilances, points_forts (VERIFIED)
RQTH restrictions create blocking when incompatible (VERIFIED)
Frontend filter panel has all required fields: métier, secteur, contrat, temps travail, trajet, télétravail, aménagement, restrictions RQTH (VERIFIED)
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - tests create their own test accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Job Matching advanced feature fully tested. Backend endpoints: GET/PUT /api/jobs/matching/preferences for saving filter criteria with priorities, POST /api/jobs/matching/search for searching with scoring (requires CV), GET /api/jobs/matching backward compatible. Scoring algorithm (job_matching.py) tested: calculate_job_score returns score, statut, blocages, vigilances, points_forts, evaluations. Priority 5 = blocking. Frontend JobMatchingSection component has filter panel with all fields (data-testid='filter-panel'), search button (data-testid='search-btn'), results grid (data-testid='results-grid'). Fixed missing JobCard component in ParticulierView.jsx.

scoring_algorithm: RQTH restrictions create blocking when incompatible (PASSED)

Sector group matching gives partial score (PASSED)
frontend_flows: Filter panel has all required fields (PASSED)
Message shown for users without CV (PASSED)
